STATIC_ROUTE_TEST.desc: Configure basic static route with default VRFs with PREFIX

STATIC_ROUTE_TEST_WITH_INTERFACE.desc: Configure with nexthop as interface instead of IP address

STATIC_ROUTE_TEST_WITH_ADVERTISE.desc: Configure static route with advertise flag

STATIC_ROUTE_TEST_WITH_VRF.desc: Configure with routes in non default VRF

STATIC_ROUTE_TEST_WITH_KEY_VRF_MGMT.desc: Configure with routes in mgmt VRF as key

STATIC_ROUTE_TEST_WITH_VRF_MGMT.desc: Configure with routes with mgmt VRF as next hop

STATIC_ROUTE_TEST_WITH_VRF_LEAK.desc: Configure with route leak across VRFS

STATIC_ROUTE_TEST_ECMP.desc: Configure comma separated values for ECMP, with nexthop as PREFIX

STATIC_ROUTE_TEST_ECMP_WITH_INTERFACE.desc: Configure comma separated values with nexthop as INTERFACE

STATIC_ROUTE_TEST_ECMP_WITH_MGMT.desc: Configure comma separated values with one nexthop as mgmt

STATIC_ROUTE_TEST_BLACKHOLE_INVALID.desc: Configure with invalid value for blackhole

STATIC_ROUTE_TEST_WITH_ADVERTISE_INVALID.desc: Configure static route with invalid advertise flag value

STATIC_ROUTE_TEST_NEXTHOP_VRF_INVALID.desc: Configure with invalid value for VRF

STATIC_ROUTE_TEST_ECMP_DISTANCE_INVALID.desc: Configure with invalid distance for ECMP

STATIC_ROUTE_TEST_ECMP_BLACKHOLE_INVALID.desc: Configure with invalid blackhop for ECMP

STATIC_ROUTE_TEST_ECMP_NEXTHOP_VRF_INVAL.desc: Configure with invalid vrf for ECMP

STATIC_ROUTE_TEST_NEXTHOP_EMPTY_VRF.desc: Configure with null value for VRF

STATIC_ROUTE_TEMPLATE_TEST.desc: Configure a default-VRF static route using the bare-prefix (template) key

STATIC_ROUTE_TEMPLATE_TEST_WITH_DISTANCE.desc: Configure distance on a bare-prefix static route

STATIC_ROUTE_TEMPLATE_TEST_WITH_BLACKHOL.desc: Configure blackhole on a bare-prefix static route

STATIC_ROUTE_TEMPLATE_TEST_WITH_NEXTHOP_.desc: Configure nexthop-vrf on a bare-prefix static route

STATIC_ROUTE_TEMPLATE_TEST_WITH_TAG.desc: Configure a route tag on a bare-prefix static route

STATIC_ROUTE_TEST_WITH_TAG.desc: Configure a route tag on a VRF-qualified static route

STATIC_ROUTE_TEMPLATE_TEST_DISTANCE_INVA.desc: Configure an out-of-range distance on a bare-prefix static route

STATIC_ROUTE_TEMPLATE_TEST_TAG_INVALID.desc: Configure an out-of-range tag on a bare-prefix static route

STATIC_ROUTE_TEST_TAG_INVALID.desc: Configure an out-of-range tag on a VRF-qualified static route
